title: Stytch Connected App (OAuth Client)
description: An OAuth 2.0 / OIDC client registered under a Stytch project. Connected Apps back third-party integrations, desktop apps, AI agents, and MCP servers that need scoped, user-consented access to the host application.

client_id.description: Stable identifier for the Connected App client. Format: connected-app-live-<uuid> or connected-app-test-<uuid>.

client_name.description: Human-readable name displayed on Stytch's consent screen.

client_type.description: OAuth client type. Public clients (e.g. desktop / SPA / MCP server distributed to end users) must use PKCE; confidential clients hold a client_secret.

client_secret.description: Returned only at creation / rotation for confidential clients.

scopes.description: Scopes the Connected App is allowed to request (e.g. openid, profile, email, plus custom resource scopes).

logo_url.description: Logo shown on the consent screen.

client_description.description: Short description shown on the consent screen, useful for explaining what an AI agent will do with the granted access.

trusted_metadata.description: Server-only metadata about the client; never visible to end users.

access_token_expiry_minutes.description: Lifetime of issued access tokens, in minutes.

refresh_token_expiry_minutes.description: Lifetime of issued refresh tokens, in minutes.
